modal.title: Cross-Border Data Processing Notice
modal.data_value: De-identified FHIR bundle: PHI is HMAC-SHA256 hashed before leaving the system.
modal.retention_value: The AI provider retains request payloads per their Terms of Service. FHIRBridge does not cache patient data.
modal.rights_value: You may decline. If your organisation requires data to remain in-country, use a self-hosted LLM.
modal.remember_label: Remember choice for this session (24 hours)
